summary: My changes: Option.__init__ (dict-default validation near the top, plus restoring self.default after super().__init__), Option.get_help_extra (add dict case for (dynamic) display), new Option.resolve_dynamic_default method, and Command.parse_args (new second-pass loop after the main param loop, before the extra-args check ~line 1197-1199). I won't touch type_cast_value/process_value/to_info_dict/multiple logic - should be no overlap with your batch_size work. Will ping again before finalizing if that changes.
